# zenpredict-bake public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zenpredict-bake.txt 366 lines (supported surface) | zenpredict-bake.features.txt 0 added (features: fit-yj,std) | zenpredict-bake.internal.txt 8 lines (8 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## trait impls (18 types)

composer::BakeError: Clone, Debug, Display, Eq, Error, PartialEq
json::ActivationJson: Clone, Copy, Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::BakeJsonError: Debug, Display, Error, From<composer::BakeError>
json::BakeLayerJson: Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::BakeRequestJson: Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::DtypeJson: Clone, Copy, Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::FeatureBoundJson: Clone, Copy, Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::MetadataEntryJson: Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::MetadataKindJson: Clone, Copy, Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::OutputSpecJson: Clone, Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::OutputTransformJson: Clone, Copy, Debug, Default, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
json::SparseOverrideJson: Clone, Copy, Debug, serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de>
optimize::OptimizeConfig: Clone, Copy, Debug, Default
zenpredict::bounds::FeatureBound: From<json::FeatureBoundJson>
zenpredict::metadata::MetadataType: From<json::MetadataKindJson>
zenpredict::model::Activation: From<json::ActivationJson>
zenpredict::model::WeightDtype: From<json::DtypeJson>
zenpredict::output_spec::OutputTransform: From<json::OutputTransformJson>

## auto traits

17 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
